chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1779 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 15575/16 2. For orders on office objection 3. For Katcha Peshi. 01.11.2016. Mr. Fayaz Ahmed Laghari, Advocate for petitioner. -.-.-. 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. It is, inter alia, contended that petitioner purchased a plot from respondent No.8 after paying the entire sale consideration way back in 2007. Now, when the petitioner and his family members are residing there, said respondent No.8 is continuously causing harassment and police officials are siding with said respondent No.8. Issue notices to the private respondents through all modes except publication as well as notice to official respondents and A.A.G for a date to be fixed by the office after three weeks. In the meantime, respondents are restrained from causing harassment to the petitioner and official respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and if the petitioner approaches the official respondents for protection, the same should be provided to him in accordance with law. However, on next date petitioner should file relevant documents under his statement in order to show exact location and description of the property in question. JUDGE Ali Haider
